scripts.dev: npm run build -w @accesscall/shared && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @accesscall/shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.check: npm run check -w @accesscall/shared && npm run check -w backend && npm run check -w frontend
